task_worker.py runs in router mode, claims pending tasks, routes tasks through router.py, downloads Google Drive files through google_io.py, parses files through document_engine.py, extracts estimate data through estimate_engine.py when applicable, sends prompt to ask_ai.py through subprocess, writes task result back through storage_layer.py, and replies into Telegram;
